name: Espresso
description: A bold, concentrated shot of pure coffee energy.

name: Caramel Macchiato
description: Smooth espresso with vanilla and caramel drizzle. A warm hug in a cup.

name: Hot Chocolate
description: Rich, creamy cocoa topped with marshmallows. Pure comfort.

name: Matcha Latte
description: Earthy green tea with steamed milk. Calming and grounding.

name: Iced Lemon Tea
description: Zesty, refreshing, and invigorating. A sunshine pick-me-up.

name: Chai Latte
description: Spiced black tea with frothy milk. Warm and nostalgic.

name: Cold Brew
description: Slow-steeped, smooth, and naturally sweet. Cool confidence in a cup.

name: Rose Latte
description: Delicate floral notes with silky milk. A little luxury for your day.

name: Golden Turmeric Latte
description: Warming spices with anti-inflammatory goodness. Self-care in a sip.

name: Bubble Milk Tea
description: Chewy tapioca pearls in creamy milk tea. Pure fun and indulgence!
